productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Solid Chambray Blue Shirt
description: CompositionBlue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, yoked back with top-stitching, pocket on left chest, embroidered branding on right chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt will give you a relaxed, easy-going air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
